Repository abstraction for app-level breed facts lookup and persistence.

BreedMapping - Class in edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.model.entity
Maps a TensorFlow model output label to a Dog API breed identifier.
BreedMapping() - Constructor for class edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.model.entity.BreedMapping
 
BreedMappingDao - Interface in edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.model.dao
DAO for persisted model-label to Dog API breed-id mappings.
BreedMappingRepository - Interface in edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.service.repository
Repository abstraction for mapping model labels to Dog API breed ids.
BreedMappingRepositoryImpl - Class in edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.service.repository
Room-backed implementation of BreedMappingRepository with asset seeding support.
BreedMappingSeedDto - Class in edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.service.seed
DTO for one JSON seed row mapping a model label to a Dog API breed id.

Hilt module providing configured Dog API networking dependencies.

DogApiService - Interface in edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.service.dogapi
Retrofit contract for The Dog API endpoints used by the app.
DogBreedInference - Class in edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.ml
Runs TensorFlow Lite dog-breed inference for a source image and returns top predictions.
DogBreedInferenceResult - Class in edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.ml
Immutable value object containing top dog-breed predictions for one analyzed image.
DogBreedInferenceResult(String, int, int, List<DogBreedPrediction>) - Constructor for class edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.ml.DogBreedInferenceResult
Creates a result bundle for one inference run.
DogBreedPrediction - Class in edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.ml
Immutable label/score pair representing one model prediction.
DogBreedPrediction(String, float) - Constructor for class edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.ml.DogBreedPrediction
Creates a prediction.
DoggoneItApplication - Class in edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit
Initializes (in the DoggoneItApplication.onCreate() method) application-level resources that cannot be handled with Hilt dependency injection.
DoggoneItApplication() - Constructor for class edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.DoggoneItApplication
 
DoggoneItDatabase - Class in edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.service
Room database containing app entities for users, scans, predictions, and breed metadata.
DoggoneItDatabase() - Constructor for class edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.service.DoggoneItDatabase
 
DoggoneItDatabase.Converters - Class in edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.service
Type converters used by Room for unsupported storage types.

E

EDIT - Enum constant in enum class edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.viewmodel.ScanDisplayViewModel.NotesMode
 
edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit - package edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit
App entry package containing the Hilt application class, main activity, and shared app helpers.
edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.ml - package edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.ml
Machine-learning inference classes for TensorFlow Lite breed classification and prediction models.
edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.model.dao - package edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.model.dao
Room DAO interfaces for persistence queries and updates across app data tables.
edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.model.entity - package edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.model.entity
Room entity models and relation projections used by the local database schema.
edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.service - package edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.service
Core service layer classes, including Room database setup and dependency-injection modules.
edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.service.dogapi - package edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.service.dogapi
Dog API integration contracts and mappers for remote breed data retrieval.
edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.service.dogapi.dto - package edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.service.dogapi.dto
DTO types representing request/response payloads exchanged with The Dog API.
edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.service.repository - package edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.service.repository
Repository abstractions and implementations that bridge UI/viewmodels to data sources.
edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.service.seed - package edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.service.seed
Seed-data loaders and DTOs used to initialize local lookup tables from bundled assets.
edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.storage - package edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.storage
App-private file storage helpers for persisted scan images and related media.
edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.ui - package edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.ui
Fragment and adapter classes that render app screens and handle user interactions.
edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.viewmodel - package edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.viewmodel
ViewModel and projection classes that manage UI state and presentation-ready data.
ensureBreedMappingsSeeded() - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.service.repository.BreedMappingRepository
Seeds mapping data from assets when no rows exist yet.
ensureBreedMappingsSeeded() - Method in class edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.service.repository.BreedMappingRepositoryImpl
 
ensureSignedIn(GoogleIdTokenCredential) - Method in interface edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.service.repository.UserSessionRepository

ensureSignedIn(GoogleIdTokenCredential) - Method in class edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.service.repository.UserSessionRepositoryImpl
